title: SWD Club Cricket fixtures for 25 and 26 October
description: CRICKET NEWS - Round 2 of the SWD Premier...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Round 2 of the SWD Premier League competition will be contested on Saturday with the defending champions, Union Stars I, to host New Dawn Park at the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn.


> The Stars were victorious in round 1, while New Dawn Park suffered a big defeat in the top league.


The Knysna Cavaliers will look forward to keeping their momentum, but they can expect a tough challenge against the Harlequins Forces at Loerie Park. George will take on Sussex at Rooirivierrif. Both teams will be looking for their first win of the season.

Union Stars II will travel to the competitive Pacaltsdorp United and can expect a tough visit.

In the promotion league, Mossel Bay will take on NMU Madibaz at the Van Riebeeck Stadium.


> The fixtures for the weekend are:


Saturday 25 October

• Premier League: Knysna Cavaliers vs Harlequins Forces; George vs Sussex; Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars II; Union Stars I vs New Dawn Park

• Promotion League: Mossel Bay vs NMU Madibaz George

• Reserve Division 1 League: Dysselsdorp vs Harlequins Forces C; Beaufort West A vs Union Stars B; Mayflower vs Melkhoutfontein.

Sunday 26 October

• Reserve Division 1 League: Western Hope A vs Pacaltsdorp United B

• Reserve Division 2 League: Sussex B vs Ramblers B; Hartenbos B vs New Dawn Park B; Plett Pioneers B vs Knysna Cavaliers B; Pirates United B vs Plett Pioneers C; George C vs New Dawn Park C; Pacaltsdorp United C vs Sussex C; and Calitzdorp Young Stars B vs Beaufort West B.
